nasb.text: Do I have any pleasure in the death of the wicked,” declares the Lord God, “rather than that he should turn from his ways and live?

esv.text: Have I any pleasure in the death of the wicked, declares the Lord God, and not rather that he should turn from his way and live?

cnv.text: 難道我喜悅惡人死亡嗎？我不是喜悅他回轉離開他所行的而存活嗎？這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，我难道喜欢恶人死亡吗？我岂不是更愿他们痛改前非并活着吗？
